purpose: New selectable heroes for AvatarPicker (today only rulo + dani exist). Each needs TWO files: a bust crop (~512x512, transparent) for the picker, and a full body (~820x1230 / 2:3, transparent) for the Dashboard hero. Register in AVATAR_OPTIONS in src/constants/config.ts.
shared_prompt_body: 3D Pixar-style chibi mascot, big head small body short limbs, octane render, soft studio lighting, premium mobile-game character, standing confidently, warm friendly expression, transparent background PNG, dark-fantasy jungle-explorer outfit (fitted shirt, tribal sash with wooden beads, explorer shorts, gladiator sandals, blue crystal pendant), teal and gold accents
full_body_note: For the *-full.png files use the SAME canvas as hero-character.png: portrait 820x1230 (2:3), character horizontally centered, feet at ~93% down the canvas, so it aligns with the Dashboard platform automatically.

items.prompt_addon: young woman explorer, long braided copper-red hair, freckles, bright green eyes, confident smirk, a short carved wooden bow on her back
young east-asian man, short black hair with an undercut, calm focused expression, thin scar over one eyebrow, holds a simple bo staff
black woman with voluminous natural afro hair adorned with tiny golden beads, radiant smile, gold hoop earrings, a satchel of glowing herbs
non-binary explorer with silver-grey short wavy hair, heterochromatic eyes (one teal, one amber), serene expression, a small floating teal wisp companion by their shoulder
